stdin_parsed.last_assistant_message:
Run:

```bash
sudo modprobe -v nvidia 2>&1 | tail -20
```

Need verbose output to see exact failure point. Likely Optimus D3cold — mobile GPU powered off. If verbose shows PCI issue, fix is kernel param `acpi_osi=! "acpi_osi=Windows 2009"` or `NVreg_DynamicPowerManagement=0x00`.
